calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees And Costs Ccp 1717
Off Calendar May-19-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: BRET YAPLE, ESQ., 707.421.1650, FOR PLAINTIFF KELKRIS ASSOCIATES, INC. DBA CREDIT BUREAU.
STEPHANIE MARTIN, ESQ., 415.320.2893, FOR DEFENDANT MARIA FASQUELLE.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS SARA YEAROUT and MARIA FASQUELLE's Motion For Reasonable Attorney's Fees And Costs CCP 1717 is denied. Defendants are not the prevailing party based on Plaintiff's dismissal, without prejudice, of this action. (Associated Convalescent Enterprises v. Carl Marks & Co., Inc. (1973) 33 Cal.App.3d 116, 121. Accord Parrott v. Mooring Townhomes Ass'n, Inc. (2003) 112 Cal.App.4th 873, 877.) Defendants' Memorandum of Costs filed on April 4, 2014 is untimely; Defendants filed a Notice of Entry of Dismissal on March 7, 2014. (CRC 3.1700(a)(1).) Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sandy Carranza #7062.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS SARA YEAROUT AND MARIA FASQUELLE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar per the dismissal filed on January 10, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
